label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael attacked long-range on final climb while ROGLIC Primoz counter-attacked GC group, crashed on descent but still gained 20 seconds on BERNAL and YATES.
tactical_patterns: Roglic gambled attacking final descent despite holding red jersey, revealing willingness to risk jersey for GC time gaps.
31-rider breakaway quality forced Roglic to cede red jersey strategically rather than burn team chasing back 4+ minutes.
Mass Lopez and Haig cooperated with Roglic on descent/finish, establishing ad-hoc alliance against Bernal/Yates weakness.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: chose solo long-range attack over breakaway sprint, showing tactical maturity and superior climbing on 10-12% gradients
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked GC group on final climb despite holding red, then prioritized time gaps over jersey after crash
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: described as 'secondhand' on final climb, unable to follow Roglic's acceleration or limit time loss
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: not able to offer chase when Roglic attacked, grouped with Bernal losing time to Roglic-Mass-Lopez-Haig quartet
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: faded on final climb while breakaway companion Iking maintained pace, revealing climbing differential in large breaks
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: made selection with Roglic-Mass-Lopez group, distancing Bernal/Yates in key GC shake-up
rider_signals.MASS Enric: positive: worked with Roglic group to finish, gave thumbs-up cooperation signal showing tactical alignment
